title: rosa austriaca f. calida
intro: Rosa austriaca f. calida, also known as the Austrian rose or Rosa calida, is a variant of the Rosa austriaca species, characterized by its ability to produce a higher concentration of essential oils than its parent plant. This rose species is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rosa austriaca f. calida include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antiviral and antibacterial properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Rosa austriaca f. calida include teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote relaxation.
